hero.subtitle: One simple platform to track your products, manage stock across branches, and see exactly where your money goes — no spreadsheets, no guesswork.
hero.note: Free to start · No credit card required

problems.title: Running a business shouldn't feel like guesswork
problems.subtitle: If any of these sound familiar, you're losing time and money every single day.

items.title: Products run out unexpectedly
items.description: You only find out something is out of stock when a customer asks for it — and walks away.

items.title: Everything is tracked by hand
items.description: Hours disappear into notebooks and spreadsheets that are outdated the moment you finish them.

items.title: Stock counts never match
items.description: Small counting mistakes quietly add up to real money lost every month.

items.title: Profits are a mystery
items.description: You sell all day, but you can't say exactly how much you actually earned.

items.title: Branches don't add up
items.description: Every branch keeps its own numbers, and getting the full picture takes days.

items.title: Paperwork piles up
items.description: Receipts, orders, and supplier notes stack up faster than anyone can file them.

solution.title: One platform that handles it for you
solution.subtitle: Every problem above has a simple answer — built into your daily workflow.

items.title: Real-time inventory tracking
items.description: Every sale and delivery updates your stock instantly. What you see is what's on the shelf.

items.title: Smart stock alerts
items.description: Get notified before a product runs out, so you reorder on time — every time.

items.title: Sales & profit reports
items.description: See your daily sales, costs, and real profit in one clear view. No math required.

items.title: Multi-branch management
items.description: All your branches and warehouses in one account, with one true set of numbers.

items.title: Employee permissions
items.description: Give each employee exactly the access they need — nothing more, nothing less.

items.title: Easy product management
items.description: Add products, set prices, and organize categories in minutes, not hours.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Your daily operations, simplified into one automatic flow.

steps.title: Manage inventory
steps.description: Stock levels stay organized and accurate.

steps.title: Sell products
steps.description: Record sales with a couple of taps.

steps.title: Analytics & reports
steps.description: See profits and trends at a glance.
